title: erigeron hultenii
intro: Erigeron hultenii, also known as Hulten's fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erigeron hultenii include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating wounds and skin conditions. Erigeron hultenii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal purposes.
